{{CargoRelic
|name=Gregor Specimen
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=06-11
|source=Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (1.2%), Evolution Chest (2%)
|description=On Jun 11, 1912, Gregor Samsa turned into a bug and died quietly.

Gregor was only an office worker but one day he woke up to realize that he had turned into a bug. After a few days, he got used to thinking like an insect. He started showing arrogance towards the dung beetle, and pitied the weaker insects. A few hours later, he and the dung beetle were made into specimens at the same time.

[Classic Quotes]

The crueler it is, the soberer I get. I do not fear death. It takes one life in exchange for another. No complaints, no explanations. What a genius.
|fame=28
|art=48
|fth=23
|civ=22
|tech=33
|ss1=Per 200 DNA Strength, Snail HP +30<br>DNA Strength: 800/800
|ss2=Per 200 DNA Strength, Snail HP +30<br>DNA Strength: 1,600/1,600
|ss3=Per 200 DNA Strength, Snail HP +30<br>DNA Strength: 2,400/2,400
|ss4=Per 200 DNA Strength, Snail HP +30<br>DNA Strength: 4,000/4,000
|ss7=Per 200 DNA Strength, Snail HP +30<br>DNA Strength: 4,000/4,000<br>Snail HP +500 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Tadpolepond skill I.png|50px]] Place in Tadpole Pond: B-tad Output +5%
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Blue Relics]]
[[Category:ART Relics]]
[[Category:Blue ART Relics]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Skill]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Output Boost]]
[[Category:Mutant Minion ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Quarry Output Boost]]
[[Category:Ancient Fossil Boost]]
[[Category:Demonic Tentacle Boost]]
[[Category:Berserker Boost]]
